messages.body: Call has been forwarded to voicemail.
Hi Makayla, how have you been? How's business going for this month?  I wanted to connect on a meeting with you whenever you have some time please.
Makayla, you're still getting so many new people booking you through Google. Can we connect for a call today?
Hi, I don\'t know how many different people and emails I have to send but I canceled zoca in July. Please stop calling
For what? I canceled, you guys are not charging me anymore (or charging me more than my subscription) I am not signing up for anything else
